commands.review_summary:
The PR sanitizes compaction-truncated Gemini thought signatures in the native Google transport and OpenAI-compatible Gemini tool-call replay, with focused OpenAI-compatible regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level and with supplied live logs. Current main forwards the affected Gemini signature fields raw, and the PR body records a before-400/after-200 replay for a compaction-truncated signature.
